name: Test Pattern (Grid)
description: Reproducible twin of create_test_pattern in grid mode: a single GLSL TOP draws an 8-division alignment grid (line color / background color baked into the shader) for projector focus, mapping alignment and output checks. The orchestrator can also overlay an output-number/label Text TOP and emits crosshair / color-bars / ramp / circle-grid variants; this twin captures the grid generator. Fully self-contained (no source) so it previews offline. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check.

nodes.name: pattern_gen
nodes.comment: Baked grid shader — no uniforms; edit division count / colors in glsl_code.

preview_description: A crisp white 8x8 alignment grid on a near-black field — a projector-focus / mapping calibration test pattern.
